cards.title: Design Lab
cards.note: Its libraries live in В§06 Knowledge and surface here as witnesses; the Substrate direction is still to be specified.

cards.title: Causality DAG
cards.direction: A Lean-audited inheritance graph of Pearl (2009) plus ten post-2009 extensions вҖ” every modern result carried as a conjecture with a tracked proof obligation.
cards.note: Honest open: the statement composes with Pearl transportability, but the proof obligation is still live.

cards.title: Learner measurability В· FLT
cards.direction: When is a learned rule an admissible measurable policy? The novel measurability theory the Fundamental Theorem forced вҖ” the Пғ-algebra precondition an agent must respect to even state a generalization certificate, the exact boundary at which it fails, and the routing abstraction that carries it to attention. (The settled characterization theorems live in В§06 Knowledge.)
cards.note: These measurability theorems are proved (sorry-free, in the FLT kernel) вҖ” what makes them an Agents programme rather than settled trivia is their role: they fix when a self-improving learnerвҖҷs policy is an admissible measurable object and when a routed/attention learner forfeits its certificate. The separation is conditional on an analytic non-Borel A вҠҶ в„қ (standard set theory); exists_measTarget_separation takes that as a hypothesis. Figure is the kernelвҖҷs real assets/borel_analytic_separation.svg.

witnesses.claim: Learner measurability is the precondition for being an admissible measurable policy: MeasurableBatchLearner is a Lean 4 typeclass for joint learner measurability, and the kernel proves a strict measurability hierarchy вҖ” discrete and symbolic learners are always measurable; uncountable selection can leave a learner outside the Borel Пғ-algebra yet inside the null-measurable one.
witnesses.source: TLT/FLT В· measurability hierarchy (redrawn) В· Learner/Measurability.lean
witnesses.svg: <rect x="40" y="26" width="360" height="104" fill="none" stroke="#16120b" stroke-width="1.3"/><text x="50" y="20" font-size="9" fill="#5f574a">universally / null-measurable</text><rect x="64" y="44" width="312" height="74" fill="#3b4a93" fill-opacity="0.07" stroke="#3b4a93" stroke-width="1.2"/><text x="74" y="40" font-size="9" fill="#3b4a93">Borel-measurable</text><rect x="92" y="62" width="256" height="48" fill="#2f6b4a" fill-opacity="0.1" stroke="#2f6b4a" stroke-width="1.2"/><text x="102" y="78" font-size="9" fill="#2f6b4a">discrete В· symbolic learners (always)</text><circle cx="300" cy="92" r="6" fill="#b06a12"/><text x="214" y="96" font-size="9" fill="#b06a12">uncountable selection</text><text x="50" y="132" font-size="8.5" fill="#5f574a">strict: the outer rings are inhabited</text>

witnesses.code:
class MeasurableBatchLearner (X C) where
    learn_measurable : a jointly-measurable learned rule stays
      measurable in future records once training is fixed
theorem measurability_hierarchy_strict :
    Measurable вҠҠ NullMeasurable  (inhabited by an FLT class)

instance : WellBehavedVCMeasTarget C
  -- any class parameterized by a StandardBorelSpace with jointly
  -- measurable evaluation; needs NullMeasurableSet, not Borel
theorem wellBehavedVC_weaker_than_krappWirth
witnesses.claim: The Пғ-algebra refinement: the kernelвҖҷs uniform-convergence condition (WellBehavedVC, requiring only NullMeasurableSet) is strictly weaker than KrappвҖ“Wirth (2024), which requires MeasurableSet (Borel) вҖ” a modern Пғ-algebra-explicit form of the PollardвҖ“Dudley universal-measurability framework, packaged as a Borel-parameterization typeclass.

witnesses.alt: Three-panel Borel-analytic separation: the singleton witness class over an analytic non-Borel set A; the proof chain bad-event вҶ’ Suslin projection вҶ’ analytic вҶ’ Choquet capacity вҶ’ null-measurable, against the failed assume-Borel path; and the strict gap WellBehavedVC HOLDS vs KrappWirth FAILS.
witnesses.claim: The Borel-analytic separation вҖ” the standout: the first concrete concept-class witness inhabiting the strict gap between an analytic-non-Borel bad event and a Borel one. WellBehavedVC holds (the bad event is null-measurable) while KrappвҖ“Wirth fails (it is not Borel). The full counterexample proof is below.

witnesses.code:
-- The entire Borel-analytic counterexample (exists_measTarget_separation)

WITNESS.   Let A вҠҶ в„қ be analytic, non-Borel (exists under
  standard set theory). Define the singleton class
      singletonClassOn(A) = {zeroConcept} вҲӘ {singletonConcept a | a вҲҲ A}
  where singletonConcept a returns true only at x = a.

STEP 1  (every hypothesis is Borel).
  zeroConcept is constant; each singletonConcept a is piecewise
  constant on the measurable singleton {a}.  So every hypothesis in
  the class is Borel-measurable.

STEP 2  (reduce to a planar witness).
  The uniform-convergence bad event вҖ” ghost-sample pairs on which
  some hypothesis has empirical gap вүҘ Оө/2 вҖ” reduces, by a preimage
  calculation, to the planar witness event W вҠҶ в„қВІ.

STEP 3  (W is analytic вҮ’ null-measurable).
  W = { (training, ghost) : вҲғ a вҲҲ A. training misses a вҲ§ ghost hits a }.
  W is an existential projection of a Borel set, hence analytic (ОЈВ№вӮҒ)
  by Suslin's theorem (1917).  Analytic sets are universally
  measurable by Choquet capacitability (1954; Kechris 30.13, formalized
  here) вҖ” so W is NullMeasurableSet.            вҠў WellBehavedVCMeasTarget

STEP 4  (W is not Borel).
  Suppose W were Borel.  Then its preimage under the constant section
      x вҶҰ (aвӮҖ, x)
  would be Borel.  But that preimage is A itself вҖ” not Borel. вҮ’вҮҗ
                                                 вҠ¬ KrappWirthWellBehaved

CONCLUSION.
  WellBehavedVCMeasTarget holds while KrappWirthWellBehaved fails:
  the gap between NullMeasurableSet and MeasurableSet is inhabited by
  a concrete concept class.                      вҲҺ  (axioms: propext,
                                                    Classical.choice, Quot.sound)

def BorelRouterCode : conditional interpolation over a
    StandardBorelSpace вҖ” attention В· routing В· transfer
theorem interpClassFixed_subset_amalgClass :
    interpolation вҠҶ amalgamation  (both inherit WellBehavedVCMeasTarget)
witnesses.claim: Why an agent needs this: BorelRouterCode abstracts conditional interpolation вҖ” attention, mixture-of-experts routing, and transfer вҖ” as Borel-parameterized concept classes, so the measurability guarantee transports to the routed/neurosymbolic learners of В§04. Interpolation and amalgamation closures are corollaries.

cards.title: Causality
cards.direction: Pearl (2009) plus ten modern extensions, Lean-audited as an inheritance DAG; each modern result a tracked conjecture.
cards.note: Open obligations are tracked, not hidden.

cards.title: Transformers В· TLT
cards.direction: The formalized core: a certified, computable generalization bound for the IEEE binary32 transformer that actually runs, and the strict depth/width expressivity hierarchy underneath it. Zero sorry; everything reduces to propext В· Classical.choice В· Quot.sound. (The open neurosymbolic-routing programme this enables lives in В§04 Agents.)
cards.note: Formalized and sealed: the certificate is about the executed program (rounding derived to a single exp atom), lifted to a real multi-head encoder stack, over a strict depth/width expressivity hierarchy. These theorems are the settled foundation the В§04 Agents neurosymbolic programme builds on.

witnesses.code:
theorem certified_executed_generalization_dudley :
    R_trueбөүЛЈбөүб¶ң вүӨ RМӮ_empбөүЛЈбөүб¶ң
      + 2В·(12вҲҡ2В·B/вҲҡm) + Оө + 2В·LВ·envBound
  -- B the affine Dudley entropy integral; envBound the fp32 envelope
witnesses.claim: The result: a generalization bound stated about the executed program, not an idealized model вҖ” every term computable from the actual fp32 weights, off a McDiarmid-small sample event.

witnesses.code:
theorem attnHead_literal_certified_generalization :
    the bound holds for TorchLeanвҖҷs literal IEEE32Exec
    scaledDotProductAttention вҖ” the rounding atom is derived,
    not supplied (no input-quantization slack)

theorem matCoords_scaledDotProductAttention :
    certifiedHead = Spec.scaledDotProductAttention  (in coordinates)
theorem multiHeadAttention_forward_one :
    Spec.MultiHeadAttention.forward (1 head) = reshape selfAttn
witnesses.claim: One network, read two ways: exact reals for the theorems and bit-exact float32 for the program, proven equal in coordinates вҖ” the certified head is TorchLeanвҖҷs literal scaledDotProductAttention, and the head-split reshape carries no pathology.

witnesses.code:
theorem transformerEncoderStackMH_certified_generalization :
    certified fp32 bound for a depth-L multi-head encoder stack
theorem multiHeadAttn_weight_lip :
    MHA Lipschitz in weights, constant linear in H, no seq-length factor
witnesses.claim: It lifts to the real architecture: a depth-L stack of true multi-head encoder layers (attention вҲҳ feed-forward), capacity growing with depth and head count and free of any sequence-length factor.

The expressivity hierarchy: depth and width strictly buy capability, proved as real non-membership separations at every rung вҖ” and the routingвҖҷs logical type is read off the score degree (affine = first-order convex cells; self-attentionвҖҷs quadratic scores = second-order semialgebraic, non-convex, yet still finite-VC).
witnesses.svg: <g fill="none" stroke="#16120b" stroke-width="1.3"><rect x="42" y="112" width="60" height="30"/><rect x="42" y="82" width="118" height="60"/><rect x="42" y="52" width="178" height="90"/><rect x="42" y="28" width="250" height="114"/></g><text x="108" y="131" font-size="10" fill="#5f574a">grade 0</text><text x="168" y="101" font-size="11" fill="#5f574a">вҠҠ 1</text><text x="228" y="71" font-size="11" fill="#5f574a">вҠҠ 2</text><text x="300" y="44" font-size="11" fill="#3b4a93">вҠҠ 3 вҖҰ</text><text x="42" y="158" font-size="9" fill="#b06a12">depth and width strictly enlarge the realizable routes вҖ” proved at every rung</text>

witnesses.code:
theorem binCascadeGrade_ssubset_succ : grade L вҠҠ grade (L+1)  вҲҖL  (depth)
theorem constArityGrade_ssubset_succ : arity n вҠҠ arity (n+1)  вҲҖn  (width)
theorem affineArgmaxCell_FO / quadraticArgmaxCell_SO_semialgebraic :
    affine routing = first-order; quadratic (self-attn) = second-order

cards.title: Learning Theory В· FLT
cards.direction: The formalized core: 354 machine-checked theorems, 0 sorry, axioms {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound} only вҖ” the Fundamental Theorem of Statistical Learning as one sealed five-way equivalence, a new constructive compression route, the three-paradigm separation, and the first Lean PAC-Bayes bridge. (The novel measurability theory this forced вҖ” the learner-measurability hierarchy and the Borel-analytic counterexample вҖ” lives in В§04 Agents.)
cards.note: Formalized and sealed (four CI tiers, incl. Comparator gold-standard + independent leanchecker replay). The fundamental theoremвҖҷs constructive direction routes through ~3,027 lines of symmetrization вҖ” a 15:1 forward/backward asymmetry вҖ” because PAC crosses from combinatorics into measure theory. That crossing is exactly what forces the В§04 Agents measurability theory.

witnesses.alt: Pentagon of the five-way fundamental-theorem equivalence: PAC learnable, finite VC dimension, finite compression, uniform convergence / vanishing Rademacher, SauerвҖ“Shelah growth.
witnesses.claim: The Fundamental Theorem of Statistical Learning, all five conjuncts proved sorry-free: PAC-learnability, finite VC dimension, a finite compression scheme, vanishing Rademacher complexity, and the SauerвҖ“Shelah growth bound are one equivalence class.

witnesses.code:
theorem fundamental_theorem (X) [MeasurableConceptClass X C] :
    PACLearnable C вҶ” FiniteCompression C
      вҶ” RademacherVanishes C вҶ” FiniteSampleComplexity C
      вҶ” SauerShelahBounded C вҶ” VCDim C < вҠӨ

witnesses.claim: The literal Independent VC development вҖ” state-of-the-art beyond Mathlib itself: a self-contained VapnikвҖ“Chervonenkis theory built directly on MathlibвҖҷs three bare primitives (Shatters, VCDim, GrowthFunction) and carried far past what Mathlib contains вҖ” 50 sorry-free modules climbing from the combinatorial core through real-valued capacity and the learning bridge to a categorical framework synthesis. It is hard precisely because each tier crosses into a new mathematical domain Mathlib does not bridge вҖ” combinatorics вҶ’ metric / descriptive set theory вҶ’ measure theory вҶ’ category theory вҖ” every crossing demanding infrastructure constructed from scratch, sorry-free, on axioms propext В· Classical.choice В· Quot.sound.

witnesses.code:
theorem vcdim_finite_imp_compression :
    VCDim C < вҠӨ вҶ’ вҲғ FiniteCompressionScheme C
  -- MWU approximate minimax; measure-theory-free pipeline
  -- (FinitePMF + boolTestExpectation + empiricalPMF)
witnesses.claim: A new proof route for the compression direction: multiplicative-weights approximate minimax replaces MoranвҖ“YehudayoffвҖҷs exact Sion minimax step, turning an existence argument into a constructive iterative scheme вҖ” with an original quantitative parameter design (margin 13/24 from slack budget 1/12 + 1/24 + 1/8).

witnesses.code:
theorem pac_not_implies_online   -- threshold class on в„•
theorem ex_not_implies_pac        -- Gold вҠ… PAC, finite subsets
theorem online_imp_pac            -- Online вҠҶ PAC, unconditional
witnesses.claim: The three-paradigm separation, each direction carried by a constructive witness and sharing no proof infrastructure: PAC вҠ… Online (threshold class on в„•), Gold вҠ… PAC (finite-subset indicators), Online вҠҶ PAC (unconditional).

witnesses.code:
theorem pac_bayes_finite (P Q : FinPMF H) (S : Sample) :
    gibbsError Q вүӨ empGibbsError Q S
      + sqrt ((KL Q P + log (2вҲҡm/Оҙ)) / (2m))
witnesses.claim: PAC-Bayes (McAllester) вҖ” the first frequentistвҖ“Bayesian bridge formalized in Lean 4: a KL-penalized Gibbs generalization bound via per-hypothesis Hoeffding, a union bound, and Jensen over the posterior.

cards.title: Measurements В· ZPM
cards.direction: The agentвҖҷs self-measurement toolkit вҖ” divergences, concentration, kernel embeddings. Pinsker with the sharp constant converts information loss into decision error.

witnesses.code:
theorem pinsker_proof (P Q : Measure Оұ)
    [IsProbabilityMeasure P] [IsProbabilityMeasure Q]
    (hac : P.AbsolutelyContinuous Q) :
    tvDistReal P Q вүӨ Real.sqrt (klDivReal P Q / 2)

cards.title: Statistics В· SLT
cards.direction: The concentration backbone: an Efron-Stein variance bound for any square-integrable function of independent inputs вҖ” the device behind most modern concentration arguments.

witnesses.code:
theorem efronStein (f : (Fin n вҶ’ О©) вҶ’ в„қ)
    (hf : MemLp f 2 ОјЛў) :
    variance f ОјЛў вүӨ
      вҲ‘ i, вҲ« x, (f x - condExpExceptCoord i f x)^2 вҲӮОјЛў

cards.title: Reinforcement Learning В· RLTheory
cards.direction: Convergence of stochastic approximation under a Lyapunov drift вҖ” Q-learning converges almost surely under Markov sampling.

witnesses.code:
theorem ae_tendsto_of_QLearning_markov
    (spec : QLearningSpec) (h : spec.Ergodic) :
    вҲҖбөҗ Пү, Tendsto (fun n вҶҰ Q n Пү) atTop
      (рқ“қ spec.optimalQ)

cards.title: Neural Networks В· NN
cards.direction: Certified network execution вҖ” TorchLean: typed tensors, verified reverse-mode autograd, IEEE-754 semantics, and interval-bound certificate checking.

witnesses.alt: Interval-bound propagation and alpha-CROWN pipeline: a perturbation set propagated through affine and ReLU relaxations to certified output bounds.
